---
title: "Assessing Park Access in Raleigh, NC"
author: "Amala Ahmad"
output: pdf_document
---

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r}
rJavaEnv::use_java(21)
```

```{r}
options(java.parameters ="-Xmx4G")
options(lehdr_use_cache = TRUE) 
```

```{r}
library(r5r)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggspatial)
library(sf)
library(lehdr)
library(tigris)
```
## Building Network



```{r}
baseline = build_network(here::here("data/baseline"))


#need to determine if i'm gonna do scenario with imaginary new park -> idk if i know how to do that
```

```{r}
block_groups = st_read(here::here("data/baseline/orange_durham_wake_block_groups.gpkg"))
census = read.csv(here::here("data/baseline/triangle_census.csv"))
```
```{r}
census = census |>
  mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID))

block_groups = block_groups |>
  mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID))

block_census = block_groups |>
  left_join(census, by=("GEOID"))
```

```{r}
parks = st_read(here::here("data/baseline/raleighparks.gpkg"))
highways = st_read(here::here("data/baseline/major_highways_osm.gpkg"))
```

```{r}
parks = st_transform(parks, 32119)
block_census = st_transform(block_census, 32119)
highways = st_transform(highways, 32119)
```

```{r}
block_census |>
  summarize( 
    min_value = min(INTPTLAT, na.rm=TRUE),
    max_value = max(INTPTLAT, na.rm=TRUE)) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
block_census |>
  summarize( 
    min_value = min(INTPTLON, na.rm=TRUE),
    max_value = max(INTPTLON, na.rm=TRUE)) |>
  ungroup()
```

@fig-1 shows a map of all City of Raleigh Parks
```{r}
#| fig-cap: City of Raleigh Parks
#| label: fig-1
ggplot() +
  annotation_spatial(data=highways) +
  annotation_spatial(data=parks, color="red", fill="red")+
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()) + shadow_spatial(st_bbox(c(xmin=-079.2360458, xmax=-078.2797890, ymin=36.2128560, ymax=35.5418073), crs=4326))
 
```

Creating Parks as Destinations
```{r}
park_points = parks |>
  st_point_on_surface() |>
  st_transform(4326) |>
  mutate(id = row_number())

block_points = block_census |>
    st_point_on_surface() |>
  st_transform(4326) |>
  mutate(id = GEOID)
```
TRAVEL TIME MATRIX

```{r}
tt_transit = travel_time_matrix(
  r5r_core = baseline,
  origins = block_points,
  destinations = park_points,
  mode = c("WALK", "TRANSIT"),
  departure_datetime = ymd_hms("2026-05-01 08:00:00")
)

transit_access = tt_transit |>
  group_by(from_id) |>
  summarize(transit_access_30 = any(travel_time_p50 <=30, na.rm = TRUE))

block_census = block_census |>
  left_join(transit_access, by = c("GEOID" = "from_id"))
```



```{r}
tt_car = travel_time_matrix(
  r5r_core = baseline,
  origins = block_points,
  destinations = park_points,
  mode = c("CAR"),
  departure_datetime = ymd_hms("2026-05-01 08:00:00")
)

car_access = tt_car |>
  group_by(from_id) |>
  summarize(car_access_30 = any(travel_time_p50 <=30, na.rm = TRUE))

block_census = block_census |>
  left_join(car_access, by = c("GEOID" = "from_id"))
```


```{r}
tt_walk = travel_time_matrix(
  r5r_core = baseline,
  origins = block_points,
  destinations = park_points,
  mode = c("WALK"),
  departure_datetime = ymd_hms("2026-05-01 08:00:00")
)

walk_access = tt_walk |>
  group_by(from_id) |>
  summarize(walk_access_30 = any(travel_time_p50 <=30, na.rm = TRUE))

block_census = block_census |>
  left_join(walk_access, by = c("GEOID" = "from_id"))
```

Mapping my transit time matrix
```{r}
block_transit_map = block_census |>
  mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)) |>
  left_join(transit_access, by = c("GEOID" = "from_id"))

#| fig-cap: Mapping Accessibility to Parks by Transit
#| label: fig-1
ggplot()+
  geom_sf(data = block_transit_map, aes(fill = transit_access_30.x))+
  geom_sf(data = parks, fill = "darkgreen", size = 0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "lightblue", "FALSE" = "gray"),
    name = "Park within 30 min transit"
  )
```

```{r}
block_walk_map = block_census |>
  mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)) |>
  left_join(walk_access, by = c("GEOID" = "from_id"))

#|fig-cap: Mapping Accessibility to Parks by Walking
#| label: fig-2
ggplot()+
  geom_sf(data = block_walk_map, aes(fill = walk_access_30.x))+
  geom_sf(data = parks, fill = "darkgreen", size = 0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "lightblue", "FALSE" = "gray"),
    name = "Park within 30 min walking"
  )
```

```{r}
block_car_map = block_census |>
  mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)) |>
  left_join(car_access, by = c("GEOID" = "from_id"))

#|fig-cap: Mapping Accessibility to Parks by Car
#| label: fig-3
ggplot()+
  geom_sf(data = block_car_map, aes(fill = car_access_30.x))+
  geom_sf(data = parks, fill = "darkgreen", size = 0.2)+
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "lightblue", "FALSE" = "gray"),
    name = "Park within 30 min drive in car"
  )
```

Calculating Income Variables

Low Income Households
```{r}

#accessible by transit
low_income_transit_access = block_census |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  filter(transit_access_30 == TRUE) |>
  summarize(
    pct_low_income_access_transit =
      sum(households_income_less_than_35k, na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(total_households, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
  )

head(low_income_access_transit)
```

```{r}

#accessible by car
low_income_car_access = block_census |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  summarize(
    pct_low_income_access_car =
      sum(households_income_less_than_35k[car_access_30 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(total_households[car_access_30 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    pct_no_car_access = 
      sum(zero_vehicle_households[car_access_30 == TRUE], na.rm=TRUE)/
      sum(total_households[car_access_30 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    pct_total_pop_access = 
      sum(total_households[car_access_30 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE)/
      sum(total_households, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    pct_low_income_access_compareall_low = 
      sum(households_income_less_than_35k[car_access_30 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE)/
      sum(households_income_less_than_35k)*100
  )



head(low_income_car_access)
```

```{r}

#accessible by walking
walk_access_metrics = block_census |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  summarize(
    pct_low_income_access_walk =
      sum(households_income_less_than_35k[walk_access_30 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(total_households, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    pct_low_income_no_car_or_access = 
      sum(zero_vehicle_households[walk_access_30 == FALSE], na.rm = TRUE) / 
      sum(total_households [walk_access_30 == FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)* 100, 
    pct_access_walk = sum(total_households[walk_access_30 == TRUE])/ sum(total_households) * 100
  )

head(walk_access_metrics)
#When looking at those without access to parks by walking, XX % also does not have a car. 
```

```{r}
block_access <- block_census |>
  mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)) |>
  left_join(transit_access, by = c("GEOID" = "from_id")) |>
  mutate(transit_access_30 = replace_na(transit_access_30.x, FALSE))

access_metrics = block_access |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  summarize(
    pct_low_income_with_access = sum(households_income_less_than_35k[transit_access_30 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE)/
     sum(total_households) * 100,
    pct_zero_vehicle_households = sum(zero_vehicle_households, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(total_households, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    pct_zero_vehicles_with_access = sum(zero_vehicle_households[transit_access_30 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) / sum(total_households)* 100
  )

head(access_metrics)

#This represents the percent of the population with access who are low income. I also calculated the total percentage of households with zero vehicles. Then I calculated that 1% of the population has access to a park and does not have a car. 
#should i somehow calculate the pct of low income households with zero vehicles?
```
